differentials.name: Rogers
differentials.reasoning: Home fixture (FDR 2), set-piece role and rising net transfers; sub-5% EO gives big rank swing on a haul.

differentials.name: Mateta
differentials.reasoning: Strong xGI/90 (0.55) and goal form; low top-10k EO makes him a clean differential striker.

differentials.name: Mbeumo
differentials.reasoning: Pens/set-pieces, home FDR 2; overall ownership lags top-10k EO, gap to exploit vs casual managers.

differentials.name: Gabriel Jesus
differentials.reasoning: Sub-8% EO Arsenal attacker at home; minutes risk caps but ceiling on a start is high.

differentials.name: Robertson
differentials.reasoning: Attacking returns plus clean-sheet upside; lower-owned than Liverpool defensive template picks.

notes: EO = ownership + captaincy share. Salah is the GW38 template anchor: ~92% top-10k ownership and ~52% captaincy puts his effective ownership well above 130% in the top 10k.
Not owning Salah is the single biggest rank risk; not captaining him is the second biggest.
Haaland is the only viable captain pivot vs the field (~30% C share).
Gabriel flagged (status 'd', 75% chance) — verify fitness before relying on his template DEF spot.
Differential value is muted in a single GW with no DGW; ceiling plays only swing rank if Salah/Haaland blank.
top10k figures are estimates blended from features.json selected_by_pct and known GW38 2024-25 elite patterns; refresh with live EO if network available.
